title: Marketplace Manager - JioMart - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - JioMart - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the JioMart family as a Marketplace Manager in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About JioMart:
JioMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JioMart!
